title: quercus californica
intro: Quercus californica, also known as the California live oak, is a species of evergreen oak tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Quercus californica are attributed to its bark, leaves, and roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus californica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Quercus californica is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to make herbal preparations such as salves, creams, and ointments for topical use.
